title: oberonia acarus
intro: Oberonia acarus, also known as the lesser orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oberonia acarus include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of health issues.
